records.ety: [L. conscius; con- + scire to know. See Conscience.]

defs: Possessing the faculty of knowing one's own thoughts or mental operations.
quotes: Some are thinking or conscious beings, or have a power of thought.

defs: Possessing knowledge, whether by internal, conscious experience or by external observation; cognizant; aware; sensible.
quotes: Her conscious heart imputed suspicion where none could have been felt.
The man who breathes most healthilly is least conscious of his own breathing.

defs: Made the object of consciousness; known to one's self; as, conscious guilt.
quotes: With conscious terrors vex me round.
